meaning: adj.可允许的,可容许程度的
examples: Religious practices are permissible under the Constitution.
If it is permissible to interpolate a personal humble opinion, I may say that...
Environmental campaigns that tell us how many people drive SUVs unwittingly imply that this behaviour is widespread and thus permissible.
With no armistice in effect, such an act would have been permissible under international law.
Weapons may not be drawn during such a discussion, but the throwing of dice is permissible.
